summary: Founder OS has reviewed the approved Natural Nation architecture, product decisions, Duey specifications, onboarding flow, design system, and MVP governance records.

known.label: Business
known.evidence: Founder vision, approved product strategy, and project state

known.label: Audience
known.value: Adults seeking practical holistic wellness support
known.evidence: Approved product positioning and age-floor decision

known.label: Core Experience
known.value: Personalized blueprint, daily protocol, progress, and Duey guidance
known.evidence: Approved onboarding flow and dashboard architecture

uncertainties.question: Should paid subscription billing be included in the first Natural Nation MVP release?
uncertainties.reason: Monetization has been discussed, but billing is not locked as an MVP requirement.

recommendation.title: Complete the MVP billing decision
recommendation.impact: This choice determines whether Billing is built now, planned for later, or excluded from the MVP. It also clears the final major uncertainty blocking the first Workspace Blueprint.
recommendation.reasoning: We first defined Natural Nation as a website, mobile app, and Duey-led wellness experience. Monetization was discussed later, but billing was never approved for the MVP. Founder OS is asking now because the answer changes scope, application needs, security work, and launch timing.
recommendation.discussionSummary: The discussion moved from defining the core wellness experience to deciding what the first release truly needs. Billing appeared as a possible business capability, but it remained outside the locked MVP decisions. The current recommendation is to settle it before the blueprint is finalized.

sources.title: Workspace Discovery and Blueprint Engine
sources.usedFor: Defines how uncertainty is resolved before applications are installed.
sources.documentText: Founder OS must understand the desired outcome, identify required capabilities, classify applications as Required, Recommended, or Later, and obtain Founder approval before installation. Material uncertainty should be resolved before the Workspace Blueprint is finalized.

sources.title: Natural Nation Project State
sources.usedFor: Confirms the current discovery result and unresolved billing decision.
sources.documentText: Natural Nation Workspace Discovery is active with 87% overall understanding. Core product and Duey requirements are high confidence. Revenue remains at 42% confidence because MVP subscription billing has not yet been decided.

sources.title: Founder OS Decision Ledger
sources.usedFor: Verifies what has been approved and confirms billing is not yet a locked MVP decision.
sources.documentText: The Decision Ledger records approved platform, workspace, discovery, and explainability decisions. It contains no Founder-approved decision requiring subscription billing in the first Natural Nation MVP release.

sources.title: Phase 4 Roadmap
sources.usedFor: Confirms that completing the Natural Nation Blueprint is the active vertical-slice objective.
sources.documentText: The current Phase 4 objective is to produce and validate the first Natural Nation Workspace Blueprint. The blueprint must identify required capabilities, explain recommendations, and separate MVP needs from later capabilities.

history.detail: Natural Nation was established as a website, mobile app, and Duey-led wellness experience.
Core journeys, scores, protocols, onboarding, and AI mentor behavior were approved.
Billing was discussed as a future capability but never locked into the MVP.
Resolve billing now because it changes scope, applications, security, and launch planning.
